emails.subject: Big Six C.A.
emails.body: Big Six C.A. Did they agree to our changes and send back a signed one ?

emails.subject: Re: Big Six C.A.
emails.body: Re: Big Six C.A. They said they had agreed but I have not seen a copy initialed by them. Andy Zipper@ENRON 05/22/2000 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Big Six C.A.
emails.body: Re: Big Six C.A. They said they had agreed but I have not seen a copy initialed by them. Andy Zipper@ENRON 05/22/2000 04:04 PM

emails.subject: Re: Big Six C.A.
emails.body: Re: Big Six C.A. Actually we got a deal term sheet from them late yesterday, so i guess they agreed to the changes.
